question: A farmer has 100 chickens. All but 10 die. How many are left?
If you have a 3-liter jug and a 5-liter jug, how do you measure exactly 4 liters?
answer: Fill the 5-liter jug, pour into 3-liter jug until full (2 liters remain in 5-liter), empty 3-liter jug, pour the 2 liters from 5-liter into 3-liter, fill 5-liter again, pour into 3-liter until full (1 liter needed), 4 liters remain in 5-liter jug
